description: Generate a 10-minute NS2 mobility trace for the Bologna Acosta traffic simulation (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg). The task requires producing an FCD export at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/acosta_fcd.xml, an NS2 mobility file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ns2_mobility.tcl, and an NS2 activity file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ns2_activity.tcl. Document the total line count of the resulting mobility file in /home/ga/SUMO_Output/trace_summary.txt using the format: total_mobility_lines=XXXX.
